title: State Department UAP Cable 4, Ashgabat, Turkmenistan, November 5, 2004
summary: UFOlogists of Turkmenistan has gained a positive reputation as a reliable partner for the United States in Turkmenistan to the bemusement of the cable’s author in the build up of civil society organizations within the country.  The reputation has become earned because everyone in Turkmenistan, apparently, “is interested in UFOs.”
csv_raw_title: State Department UAP Cable 4, Ashgabat, Turkmenistan, November 5, 2004

audience.tldr: State Department diplomatic cable from an overseas diplomatic post documenting a UAP encounter (11/5/04) over Turkmenistan.
what_we_dont: No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
Independent corroboration from non-government sources has not been confirmed.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation is technically possible but has not been demonstrated.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 50/100. Top drivers: corroboration (single_witness_instrument), witness credibility (civilian_credentialed).
